programs.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programs.sub_title: Take Me Out of My Reno!
programs.desc: After ripping apart their entire house, first time homeowners have learned they don't have the experience or time to make a renovation happen. Now, Jasmine has just six weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and bedroom into a beach-style oasis.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighbourhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina buy and flip an expensive mid-century house located in the city of Anaheim, Calif., that was designed by Cliff May, a California architect best known for developing the suburban mid-century modern design.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Back to Nature in the Franklin District, New Zealand
programs.desc: A lifelong educator returns to the Franklin District of New Zealand after 15 years away, but they will have to manage with a single income since he's leaving his business on ice back home as they venture into an expensive market.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: Two buyers from Los Angeles are moving back to Minnesota to afford more house. Still, one is more willing to spend more than the other especially if they can find room out back to play pickleball.

programs.title: Getaway
programs.desc: This week on Getaway; cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture of this glorious region.
